content:
i just started today. usually im never a meta focused player and i build teams based on how much i like dif characters but because this game relies on synergy, i wanna ask about who i should build/pull for. i really like caro and ultra units, my favs are faint, tinct, and doresain (tho i dont have him, m planning on waiting for a rerun)

is there any way possible to make a team like that work? in the meantime of waiting for doresains rerun, who should i build to form a team with tinct+faint? if its an impossible synergy to work with pls tell me lol, better to be make mistakes early on the game.

would also appreciate tips on how to play caro+ultra team 
o(///▽///) thank you ! ><
thread_title: how to build a good team w my units? who to pull for?
